issue.title: 基础设施性能优化
issue.description:
执行系统基础设施层性能优化与压力测试，包括API响应时间优化和数据库查询优化。
这是ISSUE-INT002的阶段1，专注于基础设施性能，为后续实时服务性能优化奠定基础。
目标：API响应时间P95<200ms，数据库查询性能达到高并发要求。

acs.verification_method: {'ai': {'prompt': '检查API性能测试实现，验证有k6或Artillery压测脚本，包含基准测试、并发测试、限流测试，确认性能优化方案', 'context_files': ['apps/server/perf/', 'perf/api-load-test.yml', 'apps/server/src/middleware/rateLimiter.ts']}}
acs.description:
API性能测试与优化:
- 核心API响应时间基准测试(目标P95<200ms)
- 高并发场景API吞吐量测试
- 数据库查询性能分析与优化
- 缓存策略实施与验证(Redis)
- API限流与熔断机制压力测试

acs.verification_method: {'ai': {'prompt': '检查数据库性能优化实现，验证慢查询日志配置、索引优化方案、Prisma连接池配置，确认性能测试报告', 'context_files': ['apps/server/prisma/schema.prisma', 'apps/server/src/services/matching/', 'perf/db-perf-report.md']}}
acs.description:
数据库性能优化:
- 慢查询分析与索引优化
- 高并发读写性能测试
- Prisma连接池配置优化
- 复杂查询(匹配算法)性能优化
- 数据库分表分库策略评估

open_checkpoints.description:
Main implementation commit 2ad66001 never merged to master. Key files missing: performanceMetrics.ts (P50/P90/P95/P99 metrics service), redisRateLimitStore.ts (Redis-backed rate limit store), queryAnalyzer.ts (DB query analyzer), and migration 20260419000000_perf_indexes. The /metrics endpoint and enhanced /health/detailed are missing the metrics integration. Commit 2ad66001 is NOT an ancestor of HEAD.
推荐修复: Merge commit 2ad66001 to master or re-implement the missing functionality.

Prisma connection pool configuration regression in db/client.ts. The INT002a commit added URL parameter builder to append connection_limit and pool_timeout to DATABASE_URL, but this code was reverted on master. Current db/client.ts passes raw DATABASE_URL without pool params. getConnectionStats() returns hardcoded zeros instead of querying pg_stat_activity.
推荐修复: Restore the connection pool URL parameter builder and pg_stat_activity-based getConnectionStats().

Dead code in db/client.ts: CONNECTION_POOL_SIZE (line 14), CONNECTION_TIMEOUT (line 15), IDLE_TIMEOUT (line 16) are declared but never used. ESLint reports @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars errors. These variables were used by the connection pool URL builder which was removed.
推荐修复: Either remove the unused variables or restore the code that uses them (connection pool URL builder).

Performance middleware test failures: 2 of 7 tests fail in performance.test.ts. Test 'should add performance headers to response' expects res.on('finish', ...) but implementation uses res.end override. Test 'should set X-Response-Time header' fails for same reason. Test is out of sync with implementation.
推荐修复: Fix tests to match the res.end override pattern used by performanceHeaders(), or update the implementation to use res.on('finish').

Cache middleware (middleware/cache.ts) still uses in-memory Map instead of Redis. Comment on line 13 says 'in production, use Redis'. While services/cache.ts provides Redis-backed caching for the matching service, the HTTP cache middleware layer does not use Redis. This is inconsistent with AC1 which requires Redis caching strategy.
推荐修复: Integrate Redis-backed caching into the cache middleware, or document that services/cache.ts is the Redis cache layer while middleware/cache.ts is a simple HTTP response cache.

No test coverage for cache middleware (middleware/cache.ts) or cache service (services/cache.ts). AC1 requires '缓存策略实施与验证(Redis)' but there are no automated tests verifying the cache strategy.
推荐修复: Add unit tests for the cache middleware and integration tests for the Redis cache service.

/ready endpoint in app.ts returns static 'ok' without actually checking database connectivity. The INT002a commit added a real readiness probe that tested DB connection, but the current HEAD version just returns a hardcoded response.
推荐修复: Implement actual DB connectivity check in the /ready endpoint using prisma.$queryRaw`SELECT 1`.

recent_findings.description: /ready endpoint in app.ts returns static 'ok' without actually checking database connectivity. The INT002a commit added a real readiness probe that tested DB connection, but the current HEAD version just returns a hardcoded response.
recent_findings.evidence: apps/server/src/app.ts:128-138: app.get('/ready') returns { status: 'ready', checks: { database: 'ok' } } without any DB query.
recent_findings.recommendation: Implement actual DB connectivity check in the /ready endpoint using prisma.$queryRaw`SELECT 1`.

recent_findings.description: No test coverage for cache middleware (middleware/cache.ts) or cache service (services/cache.ts). AC1 requires '缓存策略实施与验证(Redis)' but there are no automated tests verifying the cache strategy.
recent_findings.evidence: No cache.test.ts found in apps/server/src/middleware/__tests__/ or apps/server/src/services/__tests__/. find src -name '*cache*test*' returns empty.
recent_findings.recommendation: Add unit tests for the cache middleware and integration tests for the Redis cache service.

recent_findings.description: Cache middleware (middleware/cache.ts) still uses in-memory Map instead of Redis. Comment on line 13 says 'in production, use Redis'. While services/cache.ts provides Redis-backed caching for the matching service, the HTTP cache middleware layer does not use Redis. This is inconsistent with AC1 which requires Redis caching strategy.
recent_findings.evidence: apps/server/src/middleware/cache.ts:13-14: '// In-memory cache store (in production, use Redis)' and 'const cacheStore = new Map<string, CacheEntry>();'
recent_findings.recommendation: Integrate Redis-backed caching into the cache middleware, or document that services/cache.ts is the Redis cache layer while middleware/cache.ts is a simple HTTP response cache.

recent_findings.description: Performance middleware test failures: 2 of 7 tests fail in performance.test.ts. Test 'should add performance headers to response' expects res.on('finish', ...) but implementation uses res.end override. Test 'should set X-Response-Time header' fails for same reason. Test is out of sync with implementation.
recent_findings.evidence: jest output: FAIL src/middleware/__tests__/performance.test.ts - 2 tests failed. expect(mockResponse.on).toHaveBeenCalledWith('finish', expect.any(Function)) - Number of calls: 0
recent_findings.recommendation: Fix tests to match the res.end override pattern used by performanceHeaders(), or update the implementation to use res.on('finish').

recent_findings.description: Dead code in db/client.ts: CONNECTION_POOL_SIZE (line 14), CONNECTION_TIMEOUT (line 15), IDLE_TIMEOUT (line 16) are declared but never used. ESLint reports @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars errors. These variables were used by the connection pool URL builder which was removed.
recent_findings.evidence: eslint output: 14:7 error 'CONNECTION_POOL_SIZE' is assigned a value but never used, 15:7 error 'CONNECTION_TIMEOUT' is assigned a value but never used, 16:7 error 'IDLE_TIMEOUT' is assigned a value but never used
recent_findings.recommendation: Either remove the unused variables or restore the code that uses them (connection pool URL builder).

recent_findings.description: Prisma connection pool configuration regression in db/client.ts. The INT002a commit added URL parameter builder to append connection_limit and pool_timeout to DATABASE_URL, but this code was reverted on master. Current db/client.ts passes raw DATABASE_URL without pool params. getConnectionStats() returns hardcoded zeros instead of querying pg_stat_activity.
recent_findings.evidence: INT002a commit had: 'if (dbUrl && !dbUrl.includes("connection_limit")) { dbUrl = `${dbUrl}${separator}connection_limit=${CONNECTION_POOL_SIZE}&pool_timeout=...` }'. HEAD has: 'url: process.env.DATABASE_URL'. getConnectionStats() returns {active:0, idle:0, total:0}.
recent_findings.recommendation: Restore the connection pool URL parameter builder and pg_stat_activity-based getConnectionStats().

recent_findings.description: Main implementation commit 2ad66001 never merged to master. Key files missing: performanceMetrics.ts (P50/P90/P95/P99 metrics service), redisRateLimitStore.ts (Redis-backed rate limit store), queryAnalyzer.ts (DB query analyzer), and migration 20260419000000_perf_indexes. The /metrics endpoint and enhanced /health/detailed are missing the metrics integration. Commit 2ad66001 is NOT an ancestor of HEAD.
recent_findings.evidence: git merge-base --is-ancestor 2ad66001 HEAD returns false. Files not found on master: apps/server/src/services/performanceMetrics.ts, apps/server/src/middleware/redisRateLimitStore.ts, apps/server/src/db/queryAnalyzer.ts, apps/server/prisma/migrations/20260419000000_perf_indexes/migration.sql
recent_findings.recommendation: Merge commit 2ad66001 to master or re-implement the missing functionality.
